title: Wire push deps through command helpers
definition_of_done: initPushDeps, appendHighStakesOp, appendLowStakesOp in helpers.go. PersistentPreRunE calls initPushDeps. High-stakes cmds use appendHighStakesOp; low-stakes use appendLowStakesOp. Full test suite passes.
outcome: Added initPushDeps, appendHighStakesOp, appendLowStakesOp to helpers.go. PersistentPreRunE calls initPushDeps. claim/transition use appendHighStakesOp; note/heartbeat/decision use appendLowStakesOp. Push is best-effort so tests without remotes still pass. Full test suite passes.
